page_metadata.bioconda__summary: A cython wrapper around htslib built for fast parsing of Variant Call Format (VCF) files
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Library and software package for fast parsing and querying of vcf and bcf files and illustrate its speed, simplicity and utility.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Library and software package for fast parsing and querying of VCF and BCF files and illustrate its speed, simplicity and utility.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Library and software package for fast parsing and querying of VCF and BCF files and illustrate its speed, simplicity and utility.
